scripts.dev: mkdir -p logs && source .env && vite dev --port $PORT --force 2>&1 | tee logs/server.log
scripts.test:integration: pnpm build && pnpm vitest --config test/integration/vitest.config.ts run
scripts.clean: pnpm clean:node && pnpm clean:wrangler && pnpm clean:etc
scripts.d1:migrate:list:PRODUCTION: wrangler d1 migrations list tcei-d1-production --env production --remote
scripts.d1:migrate:apply:PRODUCTION: wrangler d1 migrations apply tcei-d1-production --env production --remote
scripts.refs:shadcn: rm -rf refs/shadcn && mkdir -p refs/shadcn && curl -L https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/archive/refs/tags/shadcn@3.8.5.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/shadcn --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:base-ui: rm -rf refs/base-ui && mkdir -p refs/base-ui && curl -L https://github.com/mui/base-ui/archive/refs/tags/v1.2.0.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/base-ui --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:agents: rm -rf refs/agents && mkdir -p refs/agents && curl -L https://github.com/cloudflare/agents/archive/refs/tags/agents@0.7.9.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/agents --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:agents-starter: rm -rf refs/agents-starter && mkdir -p refs/agents-starter && curl -L https://github.com/cloudflare/agents-starter/archive/refs/heads/main.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/agents-starter --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:tan-form: rm -rf refs/tan-form && mkdir -p refs/tan-form && curl -L https://github.com/TanStack/form/archive/refs/tags/@tanstack/react-form@1.28.5.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/tan-form --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:tan-query: rm -rf refs/tan-query && mkdir -p refs/tan-query && curl -sL https://github.com/TanStack/query/archive/refs/tags/@tanstack/react-query@5.95.2.tar.gz | tar -xzC refs/tan-query --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:tan-router: rm -rf refs/tan-router && mkdir -p refs/tan-router && curl -L https://github.com/TanStack/router/archive/refs/tags/@tanstack/react-router@1.168.7.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/tan-router --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:tan-start: rm -rf refs/tan-start && mkdir -p refs/tan-start && curl -L https://github.com/TanStack/router/archive/refs/tags/@tanstack/react-start@1.167.12.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/tan-start --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:better-auth: rm -rf refs/better-auth && mkdir -p refs/better-auth && curl -L https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/archive/refs/tags/v1.5.1.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/better-auth --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:cloudflare-docs: rm -rf refs/cloudflare-docs && mkdir -p refs/cloudflare-docs && curl -L https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflare-docs/archive/refs/heads/production.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/cloudflare-docs --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:cloudflare-templates: rm -rf refs/cloudflare-templates && mkdir -p refs/cloudflare-templates && curl -L https://github.com/cloudflare/templates/archive/refs/tags/v8.0.0.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/cloudflare-templates --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:aws4fetch: rm -rf refs/aws4fetch && mkdir -p refs/aws4fetch && curl -L https://github.com/mhart/aws4fetch/archive/refs/tags/v1.0.20.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/aws4fetch --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:effect4: rm -rf refs/effect4 && mkdir -p refs/effect4 && curl -L https://github.com/Effect-TS/effect-smol/archive/refs/tags/effect@4.0.0-beta.42.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/effect4 --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:tca: rm -rf refs/tca && mkdir -p refs/tca && curl -L https://github.com/mw10013/tanstack-cloudflare-agent/archive/refs/heads/main.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/tca --strip-components=1
scripts.clone:links: [ ! -e refs ] && ln -s ../tanstack-cloudflare-effect-invoice/refs refs; [ ! -e todo.md ] && ln -s ../tanstack-cloudflare-effect-invoice/todo.md todo.md
